# Marliaw Intelligence

> Marliaw Intelligence is an AI automation agency that builds custom automation systems for businesses — eliminating manual work through workflow automation, AI agents, document processing, and system integration.

## About

Marliaw Intelligence helps businesses automate repetitive, time-consuming processes using modern AI tools. The agency serves 30+ clients across 30+ countries, delivering production-ready automations in days rather than months. Core services include end-to-end workflow automation (n8n, Make, Zapier), custom AI agents, intelligent document processing, CRM/ERP integrations, and bespoke AI development.

## Services

- **Workflow Automation** — End-to-end process automation using n8n, Make, and Zapier
- **AI Agents** — Custom AI agents that handle research, outreach, and decision-making tasks
- **Document Processing** — Intelligent extraction and processing from invoices, contracts, and forms
- **System Integration** — Connecting CRMs, ERPs, databases, and third-party APIs
- **Custom AI Development** — Bespoke AI solutions tailored to specific business needs
- **AI Consulting** — Strategy and roadmap for AI adoption

## Key Results

- Invoice processing time reduced from 3 days to 11 minutes for a logistics client
- 10x average efficiency gain across client implementations
- 30+ businesses served across 30+ countries

## Contact

- Website: https://marliawintelligence.com
- Email: contact@marliawintelligence.com
